steps: PATCH /api/articles/ut-article-draft with an empty body payload
expected_result: 400 validation error and no content change should persist
compare: Mismatch: expected HTTP 400 with unchanged version count 1, got HTTP 200 and version count 2
notes: The current article service only checks for undefined content, so an empty JSON array is accepted

description: Increment view count with session deduplication
preconditions: Database reset; published article ut-article-published starts with 0 views
steps: GET /api/articles/ut-article-published twice from the same client session
api_response: {"first":{"status":200,"body":{"success":true,"data":{"id":"ut-article-published","title":"Launching article feedback from zero","status":"PUBLISHED","publishedAt":"2026-04-08T05:19:05.748Z","views":0,"createdAt":"2026-04-08T06:19:05.749Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-08T06:19:05.749Z","author":{"id":"ut-user-author","name":"Task25 Author"},"category":{"id":"ut-category-child","name":"Knowledge Base"},"tags":[{"id":"ut-tag-knowledge-base","name":"knowledge-base"}],"content":["Launch article feedback from zero.","This article is used for task 25 backend and frontend verification."]}}},"second":{"status":200,"body":{"success":true,"data":{"id":"ut-article-published","title":"Launching article feedback from zero","status":"PUBLISHED","publishedAt":"2026-04-08T05:19:05.748Z","views":1,"createdAt":"2026-04-08T06:19:05.749Z","updatedAt":"2026-04-08T06:19:05.778Z","author":{"id":"ut-user-author","name":"Task25 Author"},"category":{"id":"ut-category-child","name":"Knowledge Base"},"tags":[{"id":"ut-tag-knowledge-base","name":"knowledge-base"}],"content":["Launch article feedback from zero.","This article is used for task 25 backend and frontend verification."]}}}}
expected_result: Two 200 responses but the stored view count should increment only once per session
compare: Mismatch: expected view count 1 after repeated reads, actual view count is 2
notes: The current implementation increments views on every published detail fetch and does not track session-level deduplication
